summaryPatterns: I'm a Data Engineer (4+ years) who built ETL pipelines processing petabytes of data and reduced infrastructure costs by 40%
I'm a Data Engineer (3+ years) specialized in DWH and Big Data solutions, optimized reporting processes reducing time by 50%
I'm a Data Engineer (5+ years) experienced in fintech, automated critical business processes and improved data accuracy by 30%
I'm a Data Engineer (3+ years) who developed 50+ data integrations and reduced manual work by 40%
achievementPhrases: Optimized ETL processes reducing CPU consumption by 4x
Decreased night billing calculations from 6h to 3.5h
Built data platform processing petabytes of data
Improved data warehouse stability with blocking DQ checks
Cut storage costs by 65% after Parquet migration
Avoided $100 million in fines through financial reporting showcases
keyResponsibilities: Develop and maintain ETL/ELT pipelines using Python, SQL, and Apache Spark
Design and optimize data warehouse architectures and schemas
Integrate data from multiple sources including APIs, databases, and file systems
Build and maintain data quality monitoring and validation systems
Orchestrate data workflows using Apache Airflow
Optimize SQL queries and database performance
Collaborate with analysts and business stakeholders on data requirements
Implement CI/CD practices for data pipeline deployment
Monitor and troubleshoot data processing issues
redFlags: Listing generic responsibilities without specific metrics
Lack of quantifiable achievements or business impact
No mention of data volumes or system scale
Not specifying programming languages or tools used
notes: Data Engineer — это роль, требующая сильных технических навыков в области обработки данных и понимания бизнес-потребностей. Ключевые особенности сильных резюме: обязательное указание масштабов данных (петабайты, терабайты), конкретные метрики улучшений (сокращение времени обработки, снижение ошибок), опыт с современными инструментами (Spark, Airflow, облачные решения). Важно показать полный цикл работы с данными — от сбора до предоставления бизнесу. Востребованы навыки оптимизации производительности, работы с большими объемами данных, построения отказоустойчивых систем. Финтех и банковская сфера особенно ценят опыт с регуляторной отчетностью и высокими требованиями к качеству данных.
